name: NITTTR Bhopal – Teaching and Non Teaching – 22 Posts

basic_details.job_title: NITTTR Bhopal Teaching and Non Teaching Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: NITTTR Bhopal invites applications for 22 posts of Teaching and Non Teaching from Any Graduate candidates with ITI/diploma or relevant experience, and the online application Close on 25-05-2026 at nitttrbpl.ac.in.

salary_details.pay_scale: Pay Levels 1 to 14 as per 7th CPC

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 25-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NITTTR Bhopal to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.
